entity.name: Fizzexual
entity.description: I'm the creator and maintainer of Sprout — a small, friendly programming language built from scratch in C to be the kindest way to learn programming. I work on the language, its documentation, and a sandboxed online playground.

projects.name: Sprout
projects.description: Sprout is a from-scratch, zero-dependency programming language written in C. Plain-English syntax (make / show / when / repeat / task), friendly 'did you mean?' errors, a step-by-step learn mode, and a tiny native interpreter that depends on nothing but the operating system — no Node, no VM, no runtime to install. It has a garbage collector, first-class tasks and closures, pattern matching, a full standard library, built-in testing, and a hardened --sandbox mode for hosting untrusted code in an online playground. Built to be the kindest language to learn programming with.

channels.description: Sponsor Sprout's development through GitHub Sponsors (one-time or monthly).

plans.name: One-time gift
plans.description: Chip in any amount, once, to support Sprout's development.

plans.name: Monthly supporter
plans.description: Back ongoing work on Sprout — the language, the docs, and the playground.
